detect.label: MULTI-SIGNAL DETECTION
detect.title: 5 convergent signals. Deterministic engine. Zero speculation.
detect.d1: BFR deviation from structural norms. Early indicator of treasury tension.
detect.d2: Burn rate trajectory analysis. Detects unsustainable consumption patterns.
detect.d3: Ratio of short-term obligations to available liquidity. Threshold-based alert.
detect.d4: Structural weakness in asset/liability composition. Multi-period analysis.
detect.d5: Convergent deterioration across multiple indicators. Pattern, not noise.
detect.d6: Final output: exposure in currency, corrective window in days, dominant cause isolated.

faq.label: FREQUENTLY ASKED
faq.title: The real questions. Direct answers.
faq.q1: How does the Oracle engine work?
faq.a1: Deterministic system. Statistical distance between your profile and tension thresholds. Five simultaneous signals. Mathematical, reproducible, verifiable result. No neural networks.
faq.a2: Financial statements and income statements from the last 3 fiscal years. No banking data. No API access. Local processing, cryptographic signature.
faq.q3: What does the corrective protocol include?
faq.a3: Priority corrective levers, estimated impact, sequenced actions. Not a passive report — a quantified execution order with arbitrations ranked by urgency.
faq.a4: Ed25519 signatures on every attestation. Sovereign European environment. No third parties. No external LLM. AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit.
faq.q5: What if no tension is detected?
faq.a5: Result with low or zero exposure. That's a valid result — confirmation that stress signals are absent. No additional charge.
faq.a6: Cost of half a day of consulting. Quantified result in 48h, not a subjective opinion. If detected exposure is $100,000, the ratio speaks for itself.
cta.urgency: EXPOSURE DOES NOT DECREASE BY WAITING
cta.sub: Receive your exposure mapping in 48 hours. Quantified result. Corrective protocol included. No commitment.

method.subtitle: A deterministic, explainable, and verifiable engine. We publish our thresholds, formulas, and limitations.
method.cta.text: Test this methodology on your own data.
method.s1.label: 01 — SHADOW AI INFERENCE
method.s1.title: Detect redundancy without accessing your systems.
method.s1.p1c: : each tool maps to a functional category. Excess tools beyond the optimal threshold trigger redundancy cost weighted by √(N/50).
method.s1.threshnote: Above threshold = billable redundancy. Zylo 2024 + Flexera 2024.
method.s2.label: 02 — THE ENTROPY EQUATION
method.s2.desc: κ(N) models Brooks' Law for IT spend: coordination cost grows at
method.s2.descc: . The logarithm captures natural stabilization — 500 employees is not 10x more chaotic than 50.
method.entropy.zero: Compact org (≤50). Entropy is zero — one person governs all purchases.
method.entropy.low: Low entropy. Coordination manageable, but duplicates appear at team boundaries.
method.entropy.mod: Moderate entropy. Shadow IT and orphan licenses increasing. Monitoring recommended.
method.entropy.high: High entropy. Leaks near-inevitable without active FinOps governance. Audit urgent.
method.s3.label: 03 — ZERO-KNOWLEDGE PROTOCOL
method.s3.title: Your systems stay untouched.
method.zk.trustsub: Zero-Knowledge is architectural, not a limitation.
method.s4.label: 04 — FOUR-PHASE PROCESS
method.s4.title: From CSV to board report in 48 hours.
method.zk.step1d: Download CSVs from billing tools. You control what leaves.
method.zk.step2d: Encrypted TLS 1.3. Files never touch human hands.
method.zk.step3d: 8 detectors in isolated container. No human reads raw files.
method.zk.step4d: Structured report with dollar-valued recovery actions.
method.s5.label: 05 — 12-TYPE LEAK TAXONOMY
method.s5.title: Every lost dollar has a name, a type, and a recovery path.
method.s5.source: Covers 95%+ of SaaS/Cloud/AI losses. Sources: Flexera 2024, Zylo 2024, Gartner 2025.
method.leak.1d: Seats paid for departed or idle employees (90+ days).
method.leak.2d: Multiple tools solving the same function across teams.
method.s6.label: 06 — WHAT V1 DOES NOT DO
method.s6.title: Honesty over marketing.
method.noml.label: WHY NO ML IN V1?
method.noml.3: Zero hallucination — no AI false positives
vault.subtitle: Secure by architecture, not by promise. We publish our controls, our sub-processors, and our limitations. Trust is earned, not claimed.
vault.s1.label: 01 — ZERO-KNOWLEDGE AUDIT PROTOCOL
vault.s1.title: We analyze your spend without seeing your data.
vault.s1.desc: Unlike tools that require OAuth access to your SaaS accounts or install agents on your network, Ghost Tax operates exclusively on
vault.s1.descc: . No credentials. No API connections. No agents. Your attack surface stays identical before and after the audit.
vault.zk.step1d: Download CSV/XLSX from your billing tools. You control exactly what data leaves your systems.
vault.zk.step2d: Encrypted TLS 1.3 upload to our vault. Files never touch our team's machines — automated pipeline only.
vault.zk.step3d: Deterministic rule engine processes data in an isolated container. No human reads your raw files.
vault.zk.step4d: Structured report with anomalies, scores, and recommendations. Raw data purged within 30 days.
vault.zk.trustsub: The Zero-Knowledge protocol is an architectural choice, not a limitation. Your security posture remains unchanged.
vault.commit.1.title: AES-256 Encryption
vault.commit.1.desc: All data encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). Keys managed by AWS KMS with automatic rotation.
vault.commit.2.title: 30-Day Auto-Purge
vault.commit.2.desc: Raw uploaded files are automatically deleted 30 days after processing. Full deletion on request within 72 hours.
vault.commit.3.title: Row-Level Security
vault.commit.3.desc: Every database query is filtered by organization. No user can access another organization's data, even with a valid session.
vault.commit.4.title: Complete Audit Trail
vault.commit.4.desc: Every data access, export, and modification is logged. Audit logs exportable on demand for your compliance team.
vault.commit.5.title: US Data Residency
vault.commit.5.desc: All data stored in AWS us-east-1 (Virginia). No data leaves US jurisdiction. No international transfers.
vault.commit.6.title: Dedicated DPO
vault.commit.6.desc: security@ghost-tax.com. Response within 48 hours. Processing records and sub-processor list available on request.
vault.s2.label: 02 — DATA FLOW ARCHITECTURE
vault.s2.title: From upload to report — every step encrypted.
vault.s3.label: 03 — SUB-PROCESSORS
vault.s3.title: Full transparency on who handles what.
vault.s4.label: 04 — WHAT WE DON'T HAVE YET
vault.s4.title: Honesty over marketing.
vault.s4.desc: We list our limitations upfront. Every item below is on our roadmap with a target date.
vault.hon.why.title: Why we publish this list
vault.hon.why.desc: Any vendor that claims SOC2 without proof is a red flag. We show you exactly where we are and where we're headed. Trust is built on verified controls, not badge graphics.
vault.s5.label: 05 — SECURITY FAQ
vault.s5.title: The real questions. Direct answers.
vault.faq.q1: What data do you need for an audit?
vault.faq.a1: Billing exports (CSV/XLSX), license inventories, and optionally vendor invoices. We never need login credentials, API keys, OAuth access, or any connection to your production systems.
vault.faq.q2: Who can access my data inside Ghost Tax?
vault.faq.a2: Only the automated analysis engine processes your raw data. The assigned analyst reviews the structured output (anomalies, scores) — never the source files. All access is logged.
vault.faq.a3: We are SOC2 Type II audit-ready with all controls in place: encryption at rest/transit, RLS, audit logging, access controls, and 30-day auto-purge. Formal certification is in progress (target: Q3 2026). We list our actual controls rather than claiming certifications we don't yet hold.
vault.faq.q4: Can I delete my data before the 30-day window?
vault.faq.a4: Yes. Request deletion at security@ghost-tax.com and all data (raw files, processed results, reports) is permanently removed within 72 hours. You'll receive a deletion confirmation.
vault.faq.q5: What happens if there's a data breach?
vault.faq.a5: Our incident response protocol requires notification within 72 hours per US state breach notification laws. All data is encrypted at rest, so even in the unlikely event of unauthorized access, the data is unreadable without KMS keys.
vault.cta.sub: Our security team responds within 48 hours. We'll walk through our architecture, controls, and compliance roadmap.

landing.output.title: A structured decision surface, not a report.
landing.output.sub: Every analysis delivers 7 layers of intelligence — from executive diagnosis to stakeholder-ready memos.
landing.output.01d: One-line assessment with confidence-aware exposure range and time-to-impact.
landing.output.02d: Daily, weekly, monthly leakage rates derived from the exposure model. Softened when confidence is low.
landing.output.03d: Every signal classified as observed, inferred, or estimated. No hidden assumptions.
landing.output.04d: Percentile position against industry category. Suppressed when data is insufficient — never fabricated.
landing.output.05d: Three tiers: conservative quick-wins, structured optimization, full corrective protocol. Each with owners and payback.
landing.output.06d: Pre-written CFO memo, CIO/Ops brief, procurement summary, and board slide. Copy-ready.
landing.how.label: HOW IT WORKS
landing.how.title: From domain to decision surface in 4 steps.
landing.how.s1d: No login. No API keys. No system access. The engine works from public signals and declared inputs.
landing.how.s2d: Neural search collects technology footprint, hiring signals, and vendor patterns. Vector memory queries peer data.
landing.how.s3d: 6 detection rules classify signals by evidence tier. Exposure is bounded, never point-estimated. Confidence is numeric.
landing.how.s4d: Results appear progressively: diagnosis, exposure, proof, scenarios, stakeholder memos. Ready for internal circulation.
landing.how.conf.title: Confidence discipline
landing.how.conf.desc: Every output carries a numeric confidence score (0–100). Signals are classified as observed, inferred, or estimated. When evidence is insufficient, the system says so. When benchmarks are unavailable, percentiles are suppressed, not fabricated. The output is useful before internal ledger access — and deepens materially after purchase.
landing.diff.label: WHAT THIS IS NOT
landing.diff.title: Not a dashboard. Not a consulting deck. Not a chatbot.
landing.diff.generic.d: Show you data you already have, in charts you already ignore. No financial framing, no proof separation, no stakeholder preparation.
landing.diff.vg1.d: Detects, frames financially, separates evidence tiers, simulates correction scenarios, and arms every stakeholder with a ready memo.
landing.diff.cloud.d: Cover infrastructure but miss SaaS overlap, AI cost drift, license sprawl, shadow IT, and vendor governance gaps.
landing.diff.full.d: 7 signal types across SaaS, AI, cloud, licensing, and governance. Peer benchmarked. Loss velocity quantified daily.
landing.diff.static.d: Take weeks. Produce a PDF. No confidence scoring, no scenario simulation, no stakeholder memos, no decision acceleration.
landing.diff.auto.d: Streams results in minutes. Every finding scored, bounded, and tied to correction actions with owner assignment and payback estimates.

pricing.faq.label: PRICING FAQ
pricing.faq.title: Common questions about pricing
pricing.faq.q1: What exactly do I get for €490?
pricing.faq.a1: A complete 21-phase financial exposure analysis of your SaaS, AI, and Cloud spending. You receive: an exposure range with confidence scoring, vendor-level corrective actions, negotiation playbooks, stakeholder memos (CFO, CIO, Board), and peer benchmarking across 7 industries. Results delivered within 48 hours.
pricing.faq.q2: Is there a free trial or demo?
pricing.faq.a2: Better than a trial — you can run a free detection scan right now at /intel. Enter any domain and see exposure diagnosis, proof architecture, and scenario simulation. The paid detection adds depth: vendor-level correctives, negotiation playbooks, and decision-ready memos.
pricing.faq.a3: Yes. The report is designed to circulate internally. The CFO memo, CIO brief, and Board one-pager are formatted for direct forwarding. Most clients expense this as a consulting or audit cost.
pricing.faq.q4: What if the detection finds nothing?
pricing.faq.a4: In 200+ analyses, none has returned zero exposure. However, if your exposure is below €5,000 annually, we'll tell you. Our confidence model is transparent — we never overclaim.
pricing.faq.q5: How is this different from a consulting audit?
pricing.faq.a5: Speed and precision. Traditional audits take 6-12 weeks and cost €50k-200k. Ghost Tax delivers in 48 hours for €490, using a deterministic 21-phase pipeline. We detect patterns, not opinions.
pricing.faq.a6: Absolutely. Most clients start with Detection (€490), then upgrade to Stabilization or Monitoring based on findings. Your detection data carries forward — no duplicate work.

about.label: ABOUT GHOST TAX
about.title: Financial intelligence for IT decisions
about.sub: Ghost Tax detects hidden financial exposure in SaaS, AI, and Cloud spending. We deliver corrective protocols, not dashboards.
about.mission.label: OUR MISSION
about.mission.title: Make IT financial exposure visible and correctable
about.mission.p1: Every organization has a Ghost Tax — the invisible cost of ungoverned technology spending. Inactive licenses, duplicate tools, ungoverned AI consumption, missed negotiation leverage. These costs compound silently, quarter after quarter.
about.mission.p2: We built Ghost Tax to make this exposure visible, quantifiable, and correctable. Not with another dashboard that requires months of integration. With a deterministic intelligence pipeline that delivers decision-ready output in 48 hours.
about.beliefs.label: WHAT WE BELIEVE
about.beliefs.title: Principles that guide our work
about.belief1.title: Transparency over precision theater
about.belief1.desc: We show confidence ranges, not false certainty. Every finding is scored and labeled: observed, inferred, or estimated. If we're uncertain, we say so.
about.belief2.title: Speed kills incumbent advantage
about.belief2.desc: Traditional audits take months and cost hundreds of thousands. By the time findings arrive, the problem has compounded. 48-hour delivery changes the economics of decision-making.
about.belief3.title: Reports should sell themselves
about.belief3.desc: A CFO shouldn't need a presentation to understand financial exposure. Our Decision Packs are designed to circulate internally without intermediaries.
about.belief4.title: Ranges, not point estimates
about.belief4.desc: Financial exposure is inherently uncertain. We deliver ranges with confidence scoring. Anyone claiming exact figures is either lying or guessing.
about.fact1.label: Founded
about.fact2.label: Delivery time
about.fact3.label: Intelligence phases
about.contact.title: See it in action
about.contact.sub: Run a free scan on any domain. Results in minutes, no login required.
faq.label: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.sub: Clear answers to common questions about Ghost Tax, our methodology, pricing, and security.
faq.cat1.title: PRODUCT & METHODOLOGY
faq.cat1.a1: Ghost Tax is a financial intelligence platform that detects hidden exposure in SaaS, AI, and Cloud spending. We use a 21-phase deterministic pipeline to analyze spending patterns, identify leakage, and deliver corrective protocols. No system access required — we work from public signals and user-declared data.
faq.cat1.a2: Every finding includes a confidence score (0-85). We separate observed signals from inferred and estimated ones. Our scores are conservative by design — we never overclaim. Typical accuracy improves significantly when combined with internal data intake in the Stabilization tier.
faq.cat1.q3: What types of exposure do you detect?
faq.cat1.a3: 12 types across three domains: SaaS (inactive licenses, duplicate tools, shadow IT, license tier misalignment), AI (ungoverned consumption, redundant models, unoptimized inference), and Cloud (idle resources, over-provisioning, commitment waste, egress inefficiency).
faq.cat2.title: PRICING & BILLING
faq.cat2.a1: We believe financial intelligence should be accessible. €490 is designed to be an impulse decision for any CFO or CIO — no procurement cycle, no vendor call, no demo. The typical detection finds 18-57x the cost in recoverable exposure.
faq.cat2.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.cat2.a2: We accept all major credit cards, SEPA direct debit, and bank transfers for enterprise engagements. Payments are processed securely via Stripe. Invoicing available for Stabilization and Mission tiers.
faq.cat2.a3: If your detection reveals less than €5,000 in annual exposure, contact us within 14 days for a full refund. We stand behind our methodology.
faq.cat3.title: SECURITY & DATA
faq.cat3.q1: What data do you need from us?
faq.cat3.a1: For the free scan and Detection: only a company domain. No API access, no system agents, no credentials. For Stabilization and Mission tiers, we accept optional internal data (spending reports, vendor contracts) through a secure upload — but it's never required.
faq.cat3.a2: All data is stored in US-East-1 (Virginia) on SOC2-certified infrastructure. Data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). Raw analysis data is automatically purged after 30 days.
faq.cat3.q3: Do you sell or share my data?
faq.cat3.a3: Never. Your data is yours. We don't sell, share, or use client data for training models. Our privacy policy is clear and specific. See /legal/privacy for full details.
faq.cat4.title: GETTING STARTED
faq.cat4.a1: Go to the Decision Room (/intel), enter any company domain, and run a free scan. You'll see exposure diagnosis, proof architecture, and scenario simulation in minutes. No login required.
faq.cat4.q2: How long does it take to get results?
faq.cat4.a2: Free scan: 2-3 minutes. Paid Detection (€490): 48 hours for the complete Decision Pack. Stabilization Protocol: 5 business days. Monitoring: monthly reports delivered automatically.
faq.cta.title: Still have questions?
faq.cta.sub: Run a free scan — results in minutes, no login required.
privacy.label: PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1.title: Introduction
privacy.s1.content:
Ghost Tax Inc. ("Ghost Tax", "we", "us") operates the ghost-tax.com website and related services. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our services.

By using our services, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.
privacy.s2.title: Information We Collect
privacy.s2.content:
We collect information you provide directly:
• Email address (when you run a paid detection or submit a contact form)
• Company domain (when you use our analysis services)
• Company size and industry (optional, to improve analysis accuracy)
• Payment information (processed by Stripe — we never store card details)

We collect automatically:
• Usage data (pages visited, features used)
• Device information (browser type, operating system)
• IP address (for rate limiting and security)
privacy.s3.title: How We Use Your Information
privacy.s3.content:
We use your information to:
• Deliver financial exposure analysis and reports
• Process payments via Stripe
• Send delivery confirmations and follow-up communications
• Improve our analysis methodology and service quality
• Comply with legal obligations

We do NOT:
• Sell your data to third parties
• Share your data for advertising purposes
• Use your data to train AI models
• Profile you for purposes unrelated to our service
privacy.s4.title: Data Storage and Security
privacy.s4.content:
Your data is stored on SOC2-certified infrastructure in US-East-1 (Virginia). All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3).

Raw analysis data is automatically purged after 30 days. Structured reports are retained for the duration of your business relationship with us.

We follow Zero-Knowledge audit principles: your data never touches our analysis engine in identifiable form.
privacy.s5.title: Sub-processors
privacy.s5.content:
We use the following third-party services:
• Supabase (database hosting, US) — SOC2 Type II
• Stripe (payment processing, US) — PCI DSS Level 1
• Vercel (website hosting, US) — SOC2 Type II
• Resend (email delivery, US) — SOC2 Type II
• OpenAI (analysis, US) — SOC2 Type II, no-logging mode
• Exa (data enrichment, US) — SOC2 Type II
privacy.s6.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
privacy.s6.content:
If you are located in the European Economic Area, you have the right to:
• Access your personal data
• Rectify inaccurate personal data
• Request erasure of your personal data
• Restrict processing of your personal data
• Data portability
• Object to processing

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@ghost-tax.com.
privacy.s7.title: Data Retention
privacy.s7.content:
• Raw analysis data: automatically deleted after 30 days
• Structured reports: retained while your account is active
• Payment records: retained for 7 years (legal requirement)
• Contact form submissions: retained for 2 years
• Email communications: retained for 2 years

You can request deletion at any time by contacting privacy@ghost-tax.com.
privacy.s8.title: Changes to This Policy
privacy.s8.content:
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.

We recommend reviewing this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.
privacy.contact: Questions about this privacy policy? Contact us at privacy@ghost-tax.com.
terms.label: TERMS OF SERVICE
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1.title: Acceptance of Terms
terms.s1.content:
By accessing or using the Ghost Tax platform ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the Service.

Ghost Tax Inc. ("Ghost Tax", "we", "us") reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of modified terms.
terms.s2.title: Description of Service
terms.s2.content:
Ghost Tax provides financial intelligence analysis for SaaS, AI, and Cloud spending. Our Service includes:
• Free exposure detection scans
• Paid Financial Exposure Detection reports (€490)
• Stabilization Protocols (scoped pricing)
• Continuous Drift Monitoring (€2,000/month)
• Custom Stabilization Missions (enterprise pricing)

Output is decision intelligence, not financial advice. Ghost Tax does not provide investment, tax, legal, or accounting advice.
terms.s3.title: User Obligations
terms.s3.content:
You agree to:
• Provide accurate information when using the Service
• Use the Service only for lawful business purposes
• Not attempt to reverse-engineer our analysis methodology
• Not resell or redistribute reports without authorization
• Not use automated tools to access the Service at scale
terms.s4.title: Payment Terms
terms.s4.content:
• Detection reports (€490): one-time payment via Stripe
• Stabilization Protocols: invoiced upon agreement
• Monitoring subscriptions: monthly recurring via Stripe
• All prices are in EUR and exclude applicable taxes
• Refund policy: if detection reveals less than €5,000 annual exposure, contact us within 14 days for a full refund
terms.s5.title: Intellectual Property
terms.s5.content:
• You retain ownership of all data you provide to Ghost Tax
• Ghost Tax retains ownership of its methodology, algorithms, and platform
• Reports delivered to you are licensed for internal business use
• You may share reports within your organization without restriction
• External distribution requires written authorization
terms.s6.title: Confidentiality
terms.s6.content: Ghost Tax treats all client data as confidential. We will not disclose your analysis results, business information, or report contents to any third party without your explicit consent, except as required by law.
terms.s7.title: Limitation of Liability
terms.s7.content:
Ghost Tax provides decision intelligence based on available data and established methodology. We do not guarantee specific financial outcomes.

Our liability is limited to the amount paid for the specific service that gave rise to the claim. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

Our confidence scores reflect the reliability of our analysis. Findings with lower confidence should be validated with internal data before action.
terms.s8.title: Subscription Cancellation
terms.s8.content:
Monitoring subscriptions can be cancelled at any time. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. No partial refunds for unused portions of a billing period.

You will retain access to previously delivered reports after cancellation.
terms.s9.title: Governing Law
terms.s9.content:
These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, United States. Any disputes arising from these Terms will be resolved in the courts of Delaware.

For EU clients, this does not affect your mandatory consumer protection rights under the laws of your country of residence.
terms.s10.title: Contact
terms.s10.content:
For questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at:

Ghost Tax Inc.
Email: legal@ghost-tax.com
Website: ghost-tax.com
terms.contact: Questions about these terms? Contact us at legal@ghost-tax.com.
